title: NonUpdate-Retro
description: Unwanted connection blocking for LWJGL3ify instances.
body:
Basically a fork of [NonUpdate-Modern](https://github.com/kappa-maintainer/NonUpdate-Modern/), for [LWJGL3ify](github.com/GTNewHorizons/lwjgl3ify/) instances.


Block unwanted network connections to speed up booting your game.


Dependent on RetroFuturaBootstrap, only intended to work on LWJGL3ify instances, use the original NonUpdate for non-LWJGL3ify 1.7.10 games.
